arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta secretly hired undercover football freestyler disguised as a WAITER to 'destroy' one of his Arsenal stars in bizarre pre-match motivation drill
arts.sum: Arsenal boss Mikel Arteta has continued his trend of bizarre pre-match motivation drills after it was revealed he hired a football freestyler to pose undercover as a waiter before a game.

arts.ttl: Arsenal exploring game-changing expansion to Emirates Stadium
